zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Stewart of Atholl - Lady of Methven於1505年7月17日出生在蘇格蘭時，她的父親John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl30歲，母親Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl19歲。她於1520年6月16日與Alexander Gordon在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1566年在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Stewart of Atholl - Lady of Methven于1505年7月17日出生在苏格兰时，她的父亲John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl30岁，母亲Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl19岁。她于1520年6月16日与Alexander Gordon在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1566年在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Stewart of Atholl - Lady of Methven was born on 17 July 1505, in Scotland, her father, John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl, was 30 and her mother, Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl, was 19. She married Alexander Gordon on 16 June 1520, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1566, in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Stewart of Atholl - Lady of Methven est née le 17 juillet 1505, à Écosse, son père, John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Gordon le 16 juin 1520, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1566, à Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Stewart of Atholl - Lady of Methven am 17. Juli 1505 in Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl 30 und ihre Mutter Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl 19. Sie hat am 16. Juni 1520 in Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Alexander Gordon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1566 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Stewart of Atholl - Lady of Methven è nata il il 17 luglio 1505 nel Scotland, sua padre, John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Alexander Gordon il 16 giugno 1520, nel Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1566, nel Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Stewart of Atholl - Lady of Methvenが1505年7月17日にスコットランドで生まれた時，父John Stewart 2nd Earl of Athollは30歳，母Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Athollは19歳であった。1520年6月16日にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアでAlexander Gordonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1566年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアハッドイントンで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Stewart of Atholl - Lady of Methven(이)가 1505년 7월 17일 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1520년 6월 16일 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르에서 Alexander Gordon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1566년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 하딩턴에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Stewart of Atholl - Lady of Methven nasceu em 17 de julho de 1505, em Scotland, seu pai, John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander Gordon em 16 de junho de 1520, em Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1566, em Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Stewart of Atholl - Lady of Methven родилась 17 июля 1505 г. в местности Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Gordon 16 июня 1520 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1566 г. в местности хаддингтон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janet Stewart of Atholl - Lady of Methven nació el 17 de julio de 1505, en Scotland, su papá, John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Alexander Gordon el 16 de junio de 1520, en Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1566, en Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 61 años.
